summary: Test suite covers main tagging functionality (sanitization, main/PR/semver/feature branches) well, but lacks critical rigor. Missing edge case tests: null/empty inputs, SHA boundary conditions (<7 chars), non-hex SHAs, invalid PR numbers. Task explicitly requires 'handle errors gracefully'—no error handling tests exist. Environment variable parsing (main entry point) is untested. Workflow structure tests validate existence but not validity. Organization is clear with good Pester conventions, but test independence fragile due to file path assumptions. Would catch basic regressions but fail on invalid inputs and error paths.
